name: Rich Note
description: A beautiful, fast WYSIWYG rich-text editor for Standard Notes — live formatting, a Word-like toolbar, headings H1–H6, text & highlight colors, tables (resize, cell selection & fill), line numbers, current-line highlight, Sublime-style multiple cursors, Find & Replace (Ctrl+F), a minimap, keyboard shortcuts and Word Wrap. Light theme. Hosted build — loads directly from GitHub Pages, no download/zip required.
author: Nguyen Huu Duc
